// ⚠️ DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE IN BASE44 EDITOR
// This function is managed from the Replit project. Any changes made directly
// in Base44's function editor will be overwritten on next deployment.
// Source of truth: Replit → functions/sarahBridgeAPI.ts

import { createClientFromRequest } from 'npm:@base44/sdk@0.8.6';

function jsonResponse(data: any, status = 200) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), {
        status,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    });
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
    if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') {
        return new Response(null, {
            headers: {
                'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
                'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'POST, OPTIONS',
                'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Authorization',
            },
        });
    }

    if (req.method !== 'POST') {
        return jsonResponse({ error: 'Method not allowed. Use POST.' }, 405);
    }

    try {
        const base44 = createClientFromRequest(req);

        const authHeader = req.headers.get('Authorization');
        const expectedSecret = Deno.env.get('SARAH_BRIDGE_SECRET');

        if (!expectedSecret || authHeader !== `Bearer ${expectedSecret}`) {
            return jsonResponse({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, 401);
        }

        let body: any;
        try {
            body = await req.json();
        } catch (_e) {
            return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }, 400);
        }

        const { action, companyId, data } = body;

        if (!action) {
            return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing required field: action' }, 400);
        }

        switch (action) {
            case 'getSettings': {
                if (!companyId) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId' }, 400);
                }

                const settingsRows = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.AssistantSettings.filter({
                    company_id: companyId,
                }, '-updated_date', 10);
                console.log(`[getSettings] Found ${settingsRows.length} AssistantSettings records for company ${companyId}`);
                if (settingsRows.length > 0) {
                    settingsRows.forEach((s: any, i: number) => {
                        console.log(`[getSettings] Record ${i}: id=${s.id}, assistant_name="${s.assistant_name}", brand="${s.brand_short_name}", updated=${s.updated_date}`);
                    });
                }
                const settings = settingsRows[0] || {};

                const companies = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Company.filter({ id: companyId });
                const company = companies[0];
                const companyName = settings.brand_short_name || company?.company_name || 'our company';
                const rawName = (settings.assistant_name || 'Sarah').trim();
                const assistantDisplayName = rawName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + rawName.slice(1);
                const companyTimezone = company?.timezone || 'America/New_York';

                let knowledgeBase = '';
                try {
                    const memories = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.AIMemory.filter({
                        company_id: companyId,
                        is_active: true,
                    }, '-importance', 50);

                    if (memories && memories.length > 0) {
                        knowledgeBase = memories.map((m: any) => `- ${m.title}: ${m.content}`).join('\n');
                        console.log(`[getSettings] Loaded ${memories.length} knowledge entries for company ${companyId}`);
                    }
                } catch (e: any) {
                    console.log(`[getSettings] Could not load AIMemory: ${e.message}`);
                }

                let knowledgeArticles = '';
                try {
                    const articles = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.KnowledgeBaseArticle.filter({
                        company_id: companyId,
                        status: 'published',
                    }, '-created_date', 30);

                    if (articles && articles.length > 0) {
                        knowledgeArticles = articles.map((a: any) => `- ${a.title}: ${a.content?.substring(0, 500) || a.summary || ''}`).join('\n');
                        console.log(`[getSettings] Loaded ${articles.length} knowledge articles for company ${companyId}`);
                    }
                } catch (e: any) {
                    console.log(`[getSettings] Could not load KnowledgeBaseArticle: ${e.message}`);
                }

                let aiTraining = '';
                try {
                    const trainingData = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.AITrainingData.filter({
                        company_id: companyId,
                    }, '-created_date', 30);

                    if (trainingData && trainingData.length > 0) {
                        aiTraining = trainingData.map((t: any) => {
                            if (t.question && t.answer) return `Q: ${t.question}\nA: ${t.answer}`;
                            return `- ${t.title || ''}: ${t.content || ''}`;
                        }).join('\n');
                        console.log(`[getSettings] Loaded ${trainingData.length} AI training entries for company ${companyId}`);
                    }
                } catch (e: any) {
                    console.log(`[getSettings] Could not load AITrainingData: ${e.message}`);
                }

                const fullKnowledge = [knowledgeBase, knowledgeArticles, aiTraining].filter(Boolean).join('\n');

                return jsonResponse({
                    settings,
                    companyName,
                    assistantName: assistantDisplayName,
                    timezone: companyTimezone,
                    knowledgeBase: fullKnowledge,
                    companyDescription: company?.description || '',
                    companyServices: company?.services || '',
                    customSystemPrompt: (settings as any).system_prompt || '',
                });
            }

            case 'checkAvailability': {
                let accessToken: any = null;
                try {
                    accessToken = await base44.asServiceRole.connectors.getAccessToken('googlecalendar');
                } catch (_e) {
                    console.log('[GCAL] No calendar token available');
                }

                if (!accessToken) {
                    return jsonResponse({
                        available_slots: [
                            'Tomorrow at 10:00 AM',
                            'Tomorrow at 2:00 PM',
                            'Day after tomorrow at 11:00 AM',
                        ],
                        note: 'Calendar integration not active, providing standard slots.',
                    });
                }

                const now = new Date();
                const startTime = new Date(now);
                startTime.setHours(9, 0, 0, 0);
                if (startTime < now) startTime.setDate(startTime.getDate() + 1);

                const endTime = new Date(startTime);
                endTime.setDate(endTime.getDate() + 3);

                const params = new URLSearchParams({
                    timeMin: startTime.toISOString(),
                    timeMax: endTime.toISOString(),
                    singleEvents: 'true',
                    orderBy: 'startTime',
                });

                const resp = await fetch(
                    `https://www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/primary/events?${params.toString()}`,
                    { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` } }
                );

                if (!resp.ok) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Could not check calendar. Please propose a time.' });
                }

                const calData = await resp.json();
                const busySlots = calData.items || [];
                const proposedSlots: string[] = [];
                const durationMs = 60 * 60 * 1000;

                for (let d = 0; d < 3; d++) {
                    const currentDay = new Date(startTime);
                    currentDay.setDate(currentDay.getDate() + d);

                    for (const h of [9, 11, 14, 16]) {
                        const slotStart = new Date(currentDay);
                        slotStart.setHours(h, 0, 0, 0);
                        const slotEnd = new Date(slotStart.getTime() + durationMs);

                        const isBusy = busySlots.some((busy: any) => {
                            const bStart = new Date(busy.start.dateTime || busy.start.date);
                            const bEnd = new Date(busy.end.dateTime || busy.end.date);
                            return slotStart < bEnd && slotEnd > bStart;
                        });

                        if (!isBusy) {
                            proposedSlots.push(
                                slotStart.toLocaleString('en-US', {
                                    weekday: 'long',
                                    month: 'short',
                                    day: 'numeric',
                                    hour: 'numeric',
                                    minute: '2-digit',
                                })
                            );
                        }
                        if (proposedSlots.length >= 5) break;
                    }
                }

                return jsonResponse({ available_slots: proposedSlots });
            }

            case 'bookAppointment': {
                if (!companyId || !data) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId or data' }, 400);
                }

                const { slot_time, name, email, description } = data;

                const start = new Date(slot_time);
                if (isNaN(start.getTime())) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Invalid date format.' });
                }

                const end = new Date(start.getTime() + 60 * 60 * 1000);

                const event = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.CalendarEvent.create({
                    company_id: companyId,
                    title: `Appt: ${name}`,
                    description: description || 'Booked via AI Voice Assistant',
                    start_time: start.toISOString(),
                    end_time: end.toISOString(),
                    event_type: 'appointment',
                    status: 'scheduled',
                    attendees: email ? [email] : [],
                });

                let googleLink: any = null;
                try {
                    const accessToken = await base44.asServiceRole.connectors.getAccessToken('googlecalendar');
                    if (accessToken) {
                        const gResp = await fetch(
                            'https://www.googleapis.com/calendar/v3/calendars/primary/events',
                            {
                                method: 'POST',
                                headers: {
                                    Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`,
                                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                                },
                                body: JSON.stringify({
                                    summary: `Appt: ${name}`,
                                    description: `Booked by AI Voice Assistant\nReason: ${description || 'N/A'}`,
                                    start: { dateTime: start.toISOString() },
                                    end: { dateTime: end.toISOString() },
                                    attendees: email ? [{ email }] : [],
                                }),
                            }
                        );
                        const gData = await gResp.json();
                        googleLink = gData.htmlLink;
                    }
                } catch (_e) {
                    console.warn('[GCAL] Google Calendar sync failed');
                }

                return jsonResponse({
                    success: true,
                    message: 'Appointment booked successfully.',
                    details: { date: start.toLocaleString(), event_id: event.id, google_link: googleLink },
                });
            }

            case 'saveLead': {
                if (!companyId || !data) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId or data' }, 400);
                }

                const { name, email, phone, service_needed, address } = data;

                const leads = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Lead.filter({ company_id: companyId });
                let lead: any = null;

                if (email) lead = leads.find((l: any) => l.email === email);
                if (!lead && phone) lead = leads.find((l: any) => l.phone === phone);

                if (lead) {
                    const updates: any = {};
                    if (email && !lead.email) updates.email = email;
                    if (service_needed)
                        updates.notes = (lead.notes || '') + `\n[AI Assistant Update]: Interested in ${service_needed}`;
                    if (address) updates.street = address;

                    if (Object.keys(updates).length > 0) {
                        await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Lead.update(lead.id, updates);
                    }
                    return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: 'Lead updated.', lead_id: lead.id });
                } else {
                    const newLead = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Lead.create({
                        company_id: companyId,
                        name: name || 'Voice Lead',
                        email,
                        phone,
                        source: 'ai',
                        notes: `Captured via AI Voice Assistant.\nService: ${service_needed || 'N/A'}\nAddress: ${address || 'N/A'}`,
                    });
                    return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: 'New lead created.', lead_id: newLead.id });
                }
            }

            case 'lookupByPhone': {
                if (!data?.phone_number) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing data.phone_number' }, 400);
                }

                const incomingNumber = data.phone_number.replace(/\D/g, '');

                const allTwilioSettings = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.TwilioSettings.filter({}, '-updated_date', 500);
                console.log(`[lookupByPhone] Searching ${allTwilioSettings.length} TwilioSettings records for number ${incomingNumber}`);

                for (const ts of allTwilioSettings) {
                    const mainNum = (ts.main_phone_number || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
                    if (mainNum && mainNum === incomingNumber) {
                        console.log(`[lookupByPhone] Matched main_phone_number for company ${ts.company_id}`);
                        return jsonResponse({
                            success: true,
                            company_id: ts.company_id,
                            phone_number: ts.main_phone_number,
                            sarah_enabled: !!(ts as any).sarah_voice_enabled,
                        });
                    }

                    const availNums = (ts as any).available_numbers || [];
                    for (const an of availNums) {
                        const cleanNum = (typeof an === 'string' ? an : an.number || '').replace(/\D/g, '');
                        if (cleanNum && cleanNum === incomingNumber) {
                            console.log(`[lookupByPhone] Matched available_number for company ${ts.company_id}`);
                            return jsonResponse({
                                success: true,
                                company_id: ts.company_id,
                                phone_number: typeof an === 'string' ? an : an.number,
                                sarah_enabled: !!(ts as any).sarah_voice_enabled,
                            });
                        }
                    }
                }

                return jsonResponse({ success: false, error: 'Phone number not found' }, 404);
            }

            case 'enableSarahVoice': {
                if (!companyId) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId' }, 400);
                }

                const webhookUrl = data?.webhook_url;
                if (!webhookUrl) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing data.webhook_url' }, 400);
                }

                const twilioRows = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.TwilioSettings.filter({ company_id: companyId });
                const twilioConfig: any = twilioRows[0];
                if (!twilioConfig) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'No Twilio settings found for this company. Configure Twilio first.' }, 400);
                }

                if (!twilioConfig.account_sid || !twilioConfig.auth_token || !twilioConfig.main_phone_number) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Twilio Account SID, Auth Token, and Phone Number are required.' }, 400);
                }

                const twilioSid = twilioConfig.account_sid;
                const twilioToken = twilioConfig.auth_token;
                const twilioPhone = twilioConfig.main_phone_number.replace(/\D/g, '');
                const authStr = btoa(`${twilioSid}:${twilioToken}`);

                const numbersResp = await fetch(
                    `https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/${twilioSid}/IncomingPhoneNumbers.json?PhoneNumber=%2B${twilioPhone}`,
                    { headers: { 'Authorization': `Basic ${authStr}` } }
                );

                if (!numbersResp.ok) {
                    const errText = await numbersResp.text();
                    return jsonResponse({ error: `Twilio API error: ${numbersResp.status} ${errText}` }, 400);
                }

                const numbersData = await numbersResp.json();
                const phoneResource = numbersData.incoming_phone_numbers?.[0];
                if (!phoneResource) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: `Phone number +${twilioPhone} not found in this Twilio account.` }, 404);
                }

                const phoneSid = phoneResource.sid;
                const previousVoiceUrl = phoneResource.voice_url || '';
                const previousVoiceMethod = phoneResource.voice_method || 'POST';

                const updateResp = await fetch(
                    `https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/${twilioSid}/IncomingPhoneNumbers/${phoneSid}.json`,
                    {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Authorization': `Basic ${authStr}`,
                            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                        },
                        body: `VoiceUrl=${encodeURIComponent(webhookUrl)}&VoiceMethod=POST`,
                    }
                );

                if (!updateResp.ok) {
                    const errText = await updateResp.text();
                    return jsonResponse({ error: `Failed to update webhook: ${updateResp.status} ${errText}` }, 400);
                }

                await base44.asServiceRole.entities.TwilioSettings.update(twilioConfig.id, {
                    sarah_voice_enabled: true,
                    sarah_webhook_url: webhookUrl,
                    sarah_previous_voice_url: previousVoiceUrl,
                    sarah_previous_voice_method: previousVoiceMethod,
                });

                return jsonResponse({
                    success: true,
                    message: `Sarah Voice enabled on +${twilioPhone}. Webhook set to ${webhookUrl}`,
                    phone_number: twilioConfig.main_phone_number,
                });
            }

            case 'disableSarahVoice': {
                if (!companyId) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId' }, 400);
                }

                const twilioRows2 = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.TwilioSettings.filter({ company_id: companyId });
                const twilioConfig2: any = twilioRows2[0];
                if (!twilioConfig2) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'No Twilio settings found.' }, 400);
                }

                const twilioSid2 = twilioConfig2.account_sid;
                const twilioToken2 = twilioConfig2.auth_token;
                const twilioPhone2 = (twilioConfig2.main_phone_number || '').replace(/[^\d]/g, '');

                if (twilioSid2 && twilioToken2 && twilioPhone2) {
                    try {
                        const authStr2 = btoa(`${twilioSid2}:${twilioToken2}`);
                        const numbersResp2 = await fetch(
                            `https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/${twilioSid2}/IncomingPhoneNumbers.json?PhoneNumber=%2B${twilioPhone2}`,
                            { headers: { 'Authorization': `Basic ${authStr2}` } }
                        );
                        if (numbersResp2.ok) {
                            const numbersData2 = await numbersResp2.json();
                            const phoneResource2 = numbersData2.incoming_phone_numbers?.[0];
                            if (phoneResource2) {
                                const restoreUrl = twilioConfig2.sarah_previous_voice_url || 'https://demo.twilio.com/welcome/voice/';
                                const restoreMethod = twilioConfig2.sarah_previous_voice_method || 'POST';
                                await fetch(
                                    `https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/${twilioSid2}/IncomingPhoneNumbers/${phoneResource2.sid}.json`,
                                    {
                                        method: 'POST',
                                        headers: {
                                            'Authorization': `Basic ${authStr2}`,
                                            'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
                                        },
                                        body: `VoiceUrl=${encodeURIComponent(restoreUrl)}&VoiceMethod=${restoreMethod}`,
                                    }
                                );
                            }
                        }
                    } catch (e: any) {
                        console.error('[sarahBridgeAPI] Warning: Could not revert Twilio webhook:', e.message);
                    }
                }

                await base44.asServiceRole.entities.TwilioSettings.update(twilioConfig2.id, {
                    sarah_voice_enabled: false,
                    sarah_webhook_url: '',
                    sarah_previous_voice_url: '',
                    sarah_previous_voice_method: '',
                });

                return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: 'Sarah Voice disabled. Twilio webhook reverted.' });
            }

            case 'saveCallLog': {
                if (!companyId) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId' }, 400);
                }

                const callerPhone = data?.caller_phone || 'Unknown';
                const callDuration = data?.duration_seconds || 0;
                const transcript = data?.transcript || '';
                const callSid = data?.call_sid || '';
                const toolCallsMade = data?.tool_calls_made || [];
                const callerName = data?.caller_name || 'Voice Caller';
                const aiName = data?.assistant_name || 'Sarah';

                if (callSid) {
                    try {
                        const existingComms = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Communication.filter({
                            company_id: companyId,
                            twilio_sid: callSid
                        });
                        if (existingComms.length > 0) {
                            console.log(`[saveCallLog] Duplicate call_sid ${callSid}, skipping`);
                            return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: 'Call log already exists.', duplicate: true });
                        }
                    } catch (e: any) {
                        console.warn('[saveCallLog] Dedup check failed, proceeding:', e.message);
                    }
                }

                await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Communication.create({
                    company_id: companyId,
                    contact_name: callerName,
                    contact_phone: callerPhone,
                    communication_type: 'call',
                    direction: 'inbound',
                    subject: `${aiName} Voice Call`,
                    message: transcript || `Voice call handled by ${aiName} AI. Duration: ${Math.round(callDuration)}s.${toolCallsMade.length > 0 ? ' Actions: ' + toolCallsMade.join(', ') : ''}`,
                    twilio_sid: callSid,
                    status: 'completed',
                    duration: Math.round(callDuration),
                    cost: 0.02 * Math.ceil(callDuration / 60),
                });

                try {
                    const staff = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.StaffProfile.filter({
                        company_id: companyId,
                        is_administrator: true
                    });
                    for (const s of staff) {
                        await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Notification.create({
                            company_id: companyId,
                            user_email: s.user_email,
                            title: `${aiName} Voice Call: ${callerName}`,
                            message: `${callerName} (${callerPhone}) called. Duration: ${Math.round(callDuration)}s.${toolCallsMade.length > 0 ? ' ' + toolCallsMade.join(', ') : ''}`,
                            type: 'general',
                            link_url: '/Communication',
                            is_read: false,
                        });
                    }
                } catch (e: any) {
                    console.error('[sarahBridgeAPI] Notification error:', e.message);
                }

                if (transcript && callerPhone !== 'Unknown') {
                    try {
                        const leads = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Lead.filter({ company_id: companyId });
                        const normalizedCaller = callerPhone.replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-10);
                        const existingLead: any = leads.find((l: any) => {
                            const lp = (l.phone || '').replace(/\D/g, '').slice(-10);
                            return lp && lp === normalizedCaller;
                        });

                        if (!existingLead) {
                            await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Lead.create({
                                company_id: companyId,
                                name: callerName !== 'Voice Caller' ? callerName : `Caller ${callerPhone}`,
                                phone: callerPhone,
                                source: 'ai',
                                lead_source: `${aiName} Voice Call`,
                                status: 'new',
                                notes: `Auto-captured from ${aiName} Voice call.\n\nTranscript:\n${transcript}`,
                            });
                        } else if (transcript) {
                            await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Lead.update(existingLead.id, {
                                notes: (existingLead.notes || '') + `\n\n[${aiName} Voice Call]:\n${transcript}`,
                            });
                        }
                    } catch (e: any) {
                        console.error('[sarahBridgeAPI] Lead save from call log failed:', e.message);
                    }
                }

                return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: 'Call log saved.' });
            }

            case 'checkVoiceAccess': {
                if (!companyId) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId' }, 400);
                }

                const companies2 = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Company.filter({ id: companyId });
                const company2 = companies2[0];
                if (!company2) {
                    return jsonResponse({ allowed: false, reason: 'Company not found' });
                }

                const plan = (company2.subscription_plan || 'trial').toLowerCase();

                if (company2.trial_expired || company2.subscription_status === 'cancelled' || company2.subscription_status === 'suspended') {
                    return jsonResponse({ allowed: false, reason: `Subscription ${company2.subscription_status || 'expired'}. Please renew to use voice features.` });
                }

                let usageRecords2: any[] = [];
                try {
                    usageRecords2 = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.SubscriptionUsage.filter({ company_id: companyId });
                } catch (e: any) {
                    console.warn('[checkVoiceAccess] Could not fetch SubscriptionUsage:', e.message);
                }

                if (usageRecords2.length === 0) {
                    console.log(`[checkVoiceAccess] No usage record for ${companyId}, allowing call (will auto-create on tracking)`);
                    return jsonResponse({ allowed: true, plan, call_minutes_used: 0, call_minutes_limit: -1 });
                }

                const usage2 = usageRecords2[0];
                const callLimit = usage2.call_minutes_limit ?? 50;
                const callUsed = usage2.call_minutes_used ?? 0;

                if (callLimit === -1) {
                    return jsonResponse({ allowed: true, plan, call_minutes_used: callUsed, call_minutes_limit: -1 });
                }

                const totalAvailable = callLimit + (usage2.call_credits_purchased || 0);
                if (callUsed >= totalAvailable) {
                    return jsonResponse({
                        allowed: false,
                        reason: `Call minutes limit reached (${callUsed}/${totalAvailable}). Please upgrade your plan or purchase more minutes.`,
                        call_minutes_used: callUsed,
                        call_minutes_limit: totalAvailable
                    });
                }

                const remaining = totalAvailable - callUsed;
                return jsonResponse({
                    allowed: true,
                    plan,
                    call_minutes_used: callUsed,
                    call_minutes_limit: totalAvailable,
                    call_minutes_remaining: remaining,
                    max_call_duration_seconds: Math.min(remaining * 60, 1800)
                });
            }

            case 'trackCallMinutes': {
                if (!companyId) {
                    return jsonResponse({ error: 'Missing companyId' }, 400);
                }

                const durationMinutes = Math.ceil((data?.duration_seconds || 0) / 60);
                if (durationMinutes <= 0) {
                    return jsonResponse({ success: true, message: 'No minutes to track' });
                }

                let usageRecords3: any[] = [];
                try {
                    usageRecords3 = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.SubscriptionUsage.filter({ company_id: companyId });
                } catch (e: any) {
                    console.warn('[trackCallMinutes] Could not fetch usage:', e.message);
                }

                if (usageRecords3.length === 0) {
                    const companies3 = await base44.asServiceRole.entities.Company.filter({ id: companyId });
                    const plan3 = (companies3[0]?.subscription_plan || 'trial').toLowerCase();

                    const FALLBACK_LIMITS: Record<string, { ai: number; sms: number; calls: number }> = {
                        trial: { ai: 1000, sms: 200, calls: 50 },
                        basic: { ai: 1000, sms: 200, calls: 50 },
                        business: { ai: 5000, sms: -1, calls: -1 },
                        professional: { ai: 5000, sms: -1, calls: -1 },
                        enterprise: { ai: -1, sms: -1, calls: -1 },
                    };

                    const fb = FALLBACK_LIMITS[plan3] || FALLBACK_LIMITS.trial;
                    const today = new Date();
                    const billingStart = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1).toISOString().split('T')[0];
                    const billingEnd = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth() + 1, 0).toISOString().split('T')[0];

                    await base44.asServiceRole.entities.SubscriptionUsage.create({
                        company_id: companyId,
                        plan_name: plan3,
                        ai_limit: fb.ai,
                        ai_used: 0,
                        sms_limit: fb.sms,
                        sms_used: 0,
                        call_minutes_limit: fb.calls,
                        call_minutes_used: durationMinutes,
                        ai_credits_purchased: 0,
                        sms_credits_purchased: 0,
                        call_credits_purchased: 0,
                        billing_cycle_start: billingStart,
                        billing_cycle_end: billingEnd,
                        last_reset_date: new Date().toISOString()
                    });

                    console.log(`[trackCallMinutes] Created usage record for ${companyId}, tracked ${durationMinutes} min`);
                    return jsonResponse({ success: true, minutes_tracked: durationMinutes });
                }

                const usage3 = usageRecords3[0];
                const newTotal = (usage3.call_minutes_used || 0) + durationMinutes;
                await base44.asServiceRole.entities.SubscriptionUsage.update(usage3.id, {
                    call_minutes_used: newTotal
                });

                console.log(`[trackCallMinutes] Company ${companyId}: ${usage3.call_minutes_used || 0} + ${durationMinutes} = ${newTotal} minutes used`);
                return jsonResponse({ success: true, minutes_tracked: durationMinutes, total_used: newTotal });
            }

            default:
                return jsonResponse({ error: `Unknown action: ${action}` }, 400);
        }
    } catch (error: any) {
        console.error('[sarahBridgeAPI] Error:', error);
        return jsonResponse({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error' }, 500);
    }
});
